name: Automated Data Collection Script
description: Detects scripts performing automated collection of files matching sensitive patterns
query:
// Detect automated collection scripts
// Trigger on for-loops or find commands collecting specific file types
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(for\s+.*\%.*in\s+\(.*\.(doc|xls|pdf|pst)|find\s+.*-name.*\*\.(doc|xls|pdf|pst|msg).*-exec\s+cp)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 120 seconds
